name: workinstr-common
author: Siemens Product Lifecycle Management Software Inc.

workinstr0ViewerMarkupCommandCondition.expression: ( ctx.activeToolsAndInfoCommand && ( ctx.activeToolsAndInfoCommand.commandId === 'Awp0MarkupMain' || ctx.activeToolsAndInfoCommand.commandId === 'Awv0ImageCapture' ) ) && commandContext.fileData.file.type === 'SnapShotViewData' && commandContext.tab.workareaName !== 'popupMainPanelTabs' && ctx.workinstrViewer.viewerViewMode === 'VIEWER2D'

workinstr0DownloadCommandCondition.expression: commandContext.fileData.viewer === 'Awp0PDFViewer' || commandContext.fileData.viewer === 'Awp0TextViewer' || ( commandContext.fileData.viewer === 'Awp0ImageViewer' && commandContext.fileData.file.type !== 'SnapShotViewData' ) || commandContext.fileData.viewer === 'workinstrVideoViewer' || commandContext.fileData.viewer === 'workinstrMhtViewer' || commandContext.fileData.viewer === 'workinstrCortonaViewer'
